item.title: GPT-5.6 正式亮相：三级命名体系、分层定价，但多数用户暂时无缘使用
item.guid: GPT-5.6-正式亮相：三级命名体系、分层定价，但多数用户暂时无缘使用
item.description:
Today, OpenAI officially released the GPT-5.6 series models, including three models: the flagship model Sol, the balanced Terra for daily workflows, and the Luna, which focuses on speed and low cost. OpenAI 今天正式发布 GPT-5.6 系列模型，包含三款型号：旗舰模型 Sol、面向日常工作流的平衡型 Terra，以及主打速度与低成本的 Luna。

The release adopts a 'limited preview' format. According to U.S. government requirements, initial access is only open to a small number of government-approved trusted partners, and individual users currently have no application channels. Bloomberg reported that the first batch of partners numbers around 20, and Amazon Bedrock platform may be one of the entry points. 发布采取「有限预览」形式，根据美国政府要求，首批访问权限仅开放给一小部分经政府批准的可信合作伙伴，个人用户暂无申请渠道。彭博社报道称，首批合作伙伴约为 20 家，亚马逊 Bedrock 平台可能是入口之一。

In terms of capability, OpenAI positions Sol as its strongest model to date, focusing on strengthening agent capabilities in three areas: programming, bioinformatics, and cybersecurity. 在能力层面，OpenAI 将 Sol 定位为迄今最强模型，重点强化了编程、生物信息学与网络安全三个方向的智能体能力。

Sol scored 88.8% on Terminal-Bench 2.1, reaching 91.9% in Ultra mode, which is higher than GPT-5.5's 88.0% and also ahead of Claude Mythos 5's 84.3%. Sol 在 Terminal-Bench 2.1 上得分 88.8%，Ultra 模式下达到 91.9%，高于 GPT-5.5 的 88.0%，也领先于 Claude Mythos 5 的 84.3%。

OpenAI states that Sol's performance in the ExploitBench cybersecurity evaluation is close to Claude Mythos Preview, but it used only about one-third of the output tokens. OpenAI 称，Sol 在 ExploitBench 网络安全评测中的表现接近 Claude Mythos Preview，但仅使用了约三分之一的输出 token。

In terms of pricing, Sol is billed at per million tokens, with input at $5 and output at $30; Terra is $2.5 for input and $15 for output; Luna is $1 for input and $6 for output. 定价方面，Sol 按每百万 token 计费，输入 5 美元、输出 30 美元；Terra 为输入 2.5 美元、输出 15 美元；Luna 为输入 1 美元、输出 6 美元。

🔗 Related reading: Just now, GPT-5.6 officially released, the strongest ever but severely undermined by itself 🔗 相关阅读： 刚刚，GPT-5.6 正式发布，史上最强但被自己坑惨了

item.title: 苹果 Vision Pro 与智能眼镜负责人 Paul Meade 离职，加入 OpenAI 硬件部门
item.guid: 苹果-Vision-Pro-与智能眼镜负责人-Paul-Meade-离职，加入-OpenAI-硬件部门
item.description:
According to Bloomberg, Paul Meade, Apple's VP of Vision Pro headset and smart glasses business, is set to leave and join OpenAI's hardware division, with official onboarding expected next week. 据彭博社报道，苹果负责 Vision Pro 头显与智能眼镜业务的副总裁 Paul Meade 即将离职，加入 OpenAI 硬件部门，预计下周正式入职。

During his tenure at Apple, Meade led the Vision Products Group (VPG) in hardware engineering for the Vision Pro headset for seven years, and also spearheaded the R&D project for Apple's first display-less smart glasses. Meade 在苹果任职期间，领导 Vision Products Group（VPG）负责 Vision Pro 头显的硬件工程工作长达七年，同时主导了苹果首款无显示屏智能眼镜的研发项目。

After joining OpenAI, Meade will work with former Apple colleagues Jony Ive, Tang Tan, and Evans Hankey. 加入 OpenAI 后，Meade 将与昔日苹果同事 Jony Ive、Tang Tan 及 Evans Hankey 共事。

item.title: 曝苹果跳过 M6 Pro/Max，M7 系列直接主打 AI 性能
item.guid: 曝苹果跳过-M6-Pro/Max，M7-系列直接主打-AI-性能
item.description:
According to Bloomberg, Apple's Mac chips might skip the high-end versions of the M6 series and move directly to the AI-centric M7 generation. 据彭博社报道，苹果 Mac 芯片可能跳过 M6 系列的高端版本，直接推进以 AI 为核心的 M7 世代。

The base M6 is expected to launch as early as this year, with approximately 200 GB/s memory bandwidth, an updated neural engine, and up to 12 graphics cores. However, Apple will not release M6 Pro or M6 Max, marking a first in Apple chip history. 基础版 M6 最快将于今年推出，内存带宽约 200 GB/s，并配备更新的神经网络引擎和最多 12 个图形核心。但苹果将不会推出 M6 Pro 或 M6 Max，这是苹果芯片历史上的首次。

The M7 Pro and M7 Max are expected to be released as early as the end of next year, with the M7 Ultra anticipated in 2028. The base M7 will have approximately 240 GB/s memory bandwidth, and the entire M7 series is designed with a core goal of significantly enhancing local AI processing capabilities. M7 Pro 和 M7 Max 最快于明年底发布，M7 Ultra 则预计在 2028 年推出，基础版 M7 的内存带宽将达约 240 GB/s，整个 M7 系列以大幅提升本地 AI 处理能力为核心设计目标。

Additionally, Apple still plans to release the M5 Ultra this year, featuring approximately 36 CPU cores, 80 GPU cores, and support for up to 768 GB of memory. However, due to supply shortages, the release date for new Mac Studio models equipped with this chip remains uncertain. 此外，苹果仍计划今年发布 M5 Ultra，约 36 个 CPU 核心、80 个 GPU 核心，支持最高 768 GB 内存，但受供应短缺影响，搭载该芯片的新款 Mac Studio 发布时间存在变数。

item.title: 微软将上调 Xbox 主机价格，2TB 版 Series X 停售
item.guid: 微软将上调-Xbox-主机价格，2TB-版-Series-X-停售
item.description:
On the 25th local time, Microsoft officially announced that it would raise Xbox console prices starting August 1st. The Xbox Series S with 512GB storage will increase by $100 to approximately $500, the 1TB version will increase by another $150, and the entry-level Xbox Series X will start at around $750. 当地时间 25 日，微软官宣，将从 8 月 1 日起上调 Xbox 主机价格。配备 512GB 存储空间的 Xbox Series S 将上涨 100 美元至约 500 美元，1TB 版本价格再上涨 150 美元，入门级 Xbox Series X 起售价将约为 750 美元。

Microsoft stated that the direct reason for this round of price increases is the continued rise in storage and memory costs. Game console storage and memory prices have already increased by more than 2.5 times and are expected to double again by autumn 2027. 微软称，本轮涨价的直接原因是存储和内存成本继续上升，游戏主机存储和内存价格已经涨超 2.5 倍，并预计到 2027 年秋季还会再翻一番。

Microsoft also announced that the 2TB version of the Xbox Series X, launched in 2024, will be discontinued. 微软还宣布，于 2024 年推出的 2TB 版本 Xbox Series X 将停止销售。

item.title: 「苹果涨价引山姆代购潮」登上热搜第一
item.guid: 「苹果涨价引山姆代购潮」登上热搜第一
item.description:
Apple recently abruptly raised the prices of its entire Mac and iPad series in mainland China. Official websites, offline direct stores, and authorized channels simultaneously updated prices, with increases ranging from 800 to 3500 yuan for multiple models. 苹果日前突然上调中国内地 Mac 及 iPad 全系列售价，官网、线下直营店与授权渠道同步更新价格，多款机型涨幅在 800 元至 3500 元之间。

After the price hike news spread, Sam's Club, whose inventory prices had not yet been adjusted, quickly became a hot spot for shoppers due to price differences often exceeding a thousand yuan compared to official channels. The hashtag "Apple price hike sparks Sam's Club buying frenzy" topped the trending search list yesterday. 涨价消息传开后，山姆会员店因库存尚未同步调价，与官方渠道价差动辄逾千元，迅速成为抢购热点，「苹果涨价引山姆代购潮」词条昨日登上热搜榜第一。

According to Bianews, popular configurations are out of stock in many stores, and some models are unavailable. To prevent bulk purchases, several stores require members to visit in person for on-site activation, limit purchases to one unit per model per person, and warn that new stock will be priced higher once low-priced inventory is sold out. 据鞭牛士消息，多地门店热门配置已现货告罄，部分机型断货。为防止大批量扫货，多家门店要求会员本人到店、现场激活，单款机型每人限购一台，并提示低价库存售罄后新货将同步涨价。

item.title: 删除好友后朋友圈互动还在吗？微信公布显示逻辑
item.guid: 删除好友后朋友圈互动还在吗？微信公布显示逻辑
item.description:
WeChat Pai yesterday published an article explaining the visibility rules for Moments groups and after deleting friends. The scope of old Moments visible to new friends depends on whether the new friend was added to the corresponding group, and whether that Moment was set to "visible to this group" or "not visible to this group" at the time. 微信派昨日发布文章，集中解释朋友圈分组和好友删除后的可见规则。新好友看到旧朋友圈的范围，取决于新好友是否被加入对应分组，以及该条朋友圈当时设置的是「该分组可见」还是「该分组不可见」。

If a user sets a group as invisible, and a newly added friend is not in that group, they will still be able to see that Moment; if a group is set as visible, and a newly added friend is not in that group, they will not be able to see that Moment. 如果用户设置某个分组不可见，新加好友不在该分组里，就仍能看到这条朋友圈；如果设置某个分组可见，新加好友不在该分组里，就看不到这条朋友圈。

WeChat Pai summarized this rule as: new friends added to which group will follow the Moments rules for group visibility or invisibility. 微信派把这条规则概括为：新加好友在哪个分组，就按分组可见或不可见的朋友圈规则来。

The article also explained the traces of interaction after deleting a friend. If it's a unilateral deletion, interactions such as comments and likes in past Moments will still be retained from both perspectives; if both parties delete each other, relevant interactions will disappear from the Moments details visible to both. 文章还解释了删除好友后的互动痕迹。如果只是单方删除，对过去朋友圈里的评论、点赞等互动，双方视角下仍会保留；如果双方互删，相关互动会从双方可见的朋友圈详情里消失。

item.title: DeepSeek 大举扩招，所有部门至少扩招一倍
item.guid: DeepSeek-大举扩招，所有部门至少扩招一倍
item.description:
DeepSeek recently released large-scale recruitment information, stating that as technology continues to evolve, the company is striving to at least double the size of all departments. DeepSeek 日前发布大规模招聘信息，称随着技术持续演进，公司正努力将所有部门规模扩大至少一倍。

This round of recruitment covers 7 major categories, including algorithms, R&D, operations, product, data engineers, and functional departments, with a total of 33 open positions. Work locations include Beijing and Hangzhou, and all positions accept internships. 本轮招聘覆盖算法、研发、运维、产品、数据工程师和职能部门等 7 大类，共开放 33 个岗位，工作地点包括北京和杭州，所有岗位均接受实习。

The distribution of positions shows that DeepSeek's expansion covers underlying models, agent products, and computing infrastructure simultaneously: 岗位分布显示，DeepSeek 的扩招同时覆盖底层模型、智能体产品和算力基础设施：

    R&D directions include server-side development, pre-training data, AI search algorithms/architecture, full-stack development, Agent Harness, Agent Infra, front-end/client-side development, and test development.

    Infrastructure directions include supercomputing cluster R&D, high-performance operators/communication/compilers, large model training/inference frameworks, distributed storage, AI computing cluster performance and reliability, AI platform operations and maintenance, and IDC data center teams.

    Product directions include AI product operations, Code Agent data engineering, general Agent data products, specialized domain data products, AI creation data products, and emotional intelligence data products.

The Agent Harness team is one of the key focuses of this expansion. Previously, DeepSeek senior researcher Chen Deli stated that this team aims to benchmark against Anthropic's Claude Code to create "DeepSeek Code Harness"; Cui Tianyi, head of the Harness team, also publicly stated that as a newly established department, the team is severely understaffed. Agent Harness 团队是本轮扩招的重点之一。此前 DeepSeek 资深研究员陈德里称，该团队要对标 Anthropic 的 Claude Code，做「DeepSeek Code Harness」；Harness 团队负责人崔添翼也公开表示，团队作为新成立部门，人员非常紧缺。

DeepSeek has also opened positions for "AI cross-disciplinary technical talent," targeting candidates with special talents who wish to participate in creating and building AGI, with no professional background restrictions. Bonus points for this position include achieving excellence in a certain field, participating in well-known open-source projects, writing technical blogs or books, and having entrepreneurial experience. DeepSeek 还开放了「AI 跨界技术人才」岗位，面向具备特殊才能、希望参与创造和构建 AGI 的候选人，不设专业背景限制。该岗位加分项包括在某一领域做到极致、参与知名开源项目、写过技术博客或书籍、有创业经历等。

item.title: 大疆回应 Pocket 4P 开售秒空：黄牛团伙已被警方采取强制措施
item.guid: 大疆回应-Pocket-4P-开售秒空：黄牛团伙已被警方采取强制措施
item.description:
DJI responded yesterday to the "instant sell-out" phenomenon that occurred after the launch of the Osmo Pocket 4 series, stating that the initial stock was nearly 10 times higher than that of the previous generation product, Osmo Pocket 3, but market demand still exceeded expectations, leading to shortages in some channels. The company stated it is fully pushing production and restocking. 大疆昨日就 Osmo Pocket 4 系列开售后出现的「秒空」现象作出回应，称首批备货量较上代产品 Osmo Pocket 3 提升近 10 倍，但市场需求依然超出预期，导致部分渠道供不应求。公司表示正全力推进生产和补货。

Regarding the abnormal rush buying during the sales period, DJI stated that after tracing, it has successfully identified some scalper groups and has officially reported the case to the public security organs. Following preliminary police investigation, criminal compulsory measures have recently been taken against a multi-person gang. 针对开售期间出现的异常抢购，大疆称经溯源已成功锁定部分黄牛团伙，并已向公安机关正式报案。经警方初步侦查，近日已对多人团伙采取刑事强制措施。

It was found that the gang is suspected of using virtual numbers, virtual IPs, and other means to commit crimes involving computer information systems, maliciously attacking and disrupting the normal purchasing order of the DJI store. 经查，该团伙涉嫌利用虚拟号码、虚拟 IP 等手段实施涉及计算机信息系统的犯罪行为，恶意攻击并破坏大疆商城的正常购买秩序。

DJI stated that it will continue to cooperate with public security organs to advance the investigation in accordance with the law, and further improve the platform's risk control mechanisms, maintaining a "zero tolerance" attitude towards scalpers' malicious hoarding, reselling, and other behaviors that disrupt the purchasing order. 大疆表示，将持续配合公安机关依法推进案件侦办，并进一步完善平台风控机制，对黄牛恶意囤货、倒卖等扰乱购买秩序的行为保持「零容忍」态度。

item.title: 何小鹏：年底自动驾驶可合法进入全球市场，小鹏机器人中心新设九部门
item.guid: 何小鹏：年底自动驾驶可合法进入全球市场，小鹏机器人中心新设九部门
item.description:
He Xiaopeng, CEO of Xpeng Motors, posted yesterday that Xpeng's second-generation VLA is entering a confirmed global mode. He mentioned that this week, the UN WP29 Contracting Parties meeting approved two regulations, DCAS UNR 171 series 02 and UNR ADS. The former corresponds to urban NGP function regulations, and the latter corresponds to L3-L5 autonomous driving regulations. 小鹏汽车 CEO 何小鹏昨日发文称，小鹏第二代 VLA 走向全球进入确定模式。他提到，本周联合国 WP29 缔约国会议批准了 DCAS UNR 171 series 02 和 UNR ADS 两项法规，前者对应城区 NGP 功能法规，后者对应 L3-L5 自动驾驶法规。

He Xiaopeng stated that DCAS UNR 171 series 02 will take effect in six months and become a mandatory EU regulation, allowing autonomous driving to legally enter the EU and other global markets by the end of 2026; UNR ADS is currently a framework regulation but will accelerate the approval and implementation of L4 Robotaxi in various regions. 何小鹏称，DCAS UNR 171 series 02 会在六个月后生效并成为欧盟强制法规，到 2026 年底自动驾驶可以合法进入欧盟等全球市场；UNR ADS 目前仍是框架性法规，但会加速 L4 Robotaxi 在各地审批落地。

According to 21st Century Business Herald, Xpeng's Robotics Center has established nine new second-level departments. After announcing his personal concurrent role as head of the Robotics Center, He Xiaopeng also currently serves as the head of the Robotics Center's Product Department, directly receiving reports from various organizational leaders within the Product Department; leaders of the Embodied Systems Engineering Department, General Base Department, and Brand Marketing Department also report directly to him. 另据 21 财经消息，小鹏机器人中心新设九个二级部门。何小鹏在宣布亲自兼任机器人中心负责人后，目前还兼任机器人中心产品部负责人，并直接听取产品部内各组织负责人汇报；具身系统工程部、通用基座部和品牌营销部等负责人也向他直接汇报。

item.title: 特斯拉就 FSD 致死行人诉讼达成和解
item.guid: 特斯拉就-FSD-致死行人诉讼达成和解
item.description:
According to Bloomberg, Tesla has reached a settlement with the family of a pedestrian in the U.S. regarding a fatal accident lawsuit, with the terms of the settlement not disclosed by either party. 据彭博社报道，特斯拉已与美国一名行人家属就致死事故诉讼达成和解，双方没有公开和解条款。

The accident occurred on November 28, 2023, on a highway between Flagstaff and Phoenix, Arizona, USA; 71-year-old Johna Story was struck and killed by a Model Y in FSD mode while assisting with traffic caused by a previous accident. 事故发生在 2023 年 11 月 28 日，地点位于美国亚利桑那州 Flagstaff 与 Phoenix 之间的高速公路；71 岁的 Johna Story 下车协助疏导此前事故造成的交通时，被一辆处于 FSD 模式的 Model Y 撞击身亡。

Electrek stated that this is the first known pedestrian fatality related to Tesla FSD. The U.S. National Highway Traffic Safety Administration (NHTSA) initiated a preliminary assessment in October 2024, which was subsequently upgraded to an engineering analysis in March 2026, covering approximately 3.2 million vehicles. Electrek 称，这是首个已知与 Tesla FSD 相关的行人死亡事故。美国国家公路交通安全管理局（NHTSA）在 2024 年 10 月开启初步评估，随后在 2026 年 3 月升级为工程分析，覆盖约 320 万辆车。

NHTSA's investigation focuses on whether FSD can timely identify common road conditions and allow drivers reaction time under conditions that impair camera visibility, such as glare, fog, and dust. NHTSA 的调查重点是 FSD 在眩光、雾、尘土等削弱摄像头可见性的条件下，是否能及时识别常见道路状况并给驾驶者留出反应时间。

item.title: 💡 国家能源局局长：生成 5 秒 AI 高清视频用电量相当于充满 10 部手机
item.guid: 💡-国家能源局局长：生成-5-秒-AI-高清视频用电量相当于充满-10-部手机
item.description:
According to Yicai, on the morning of June 26, the State Council Information Office held a series of press conferences on the theme of "Starting the 15th Five-Year Plan." Wang Hongzhi, a member of the Party Group of the National Development and Reform Commission and Director of the National Energy Administration, introduced the plan for accelerating the construction of a new energy system during the "15th Five-Year Plan" period. He gave an example of computing power consumption: 据第一财经报道，6 月 26 日上午，国新办举行「开局起步『十五五』」系列主题新闻发布会，国家发展改革委党组成员、国家能源局局长王宏志介绍「十五五」时期加快新型能源体系建设规划情况。他以算力能耗举例：

Every 5 seconds of high-definition video generated by AI consumes enough electricity to fully charge 10 mobile phones.

Wang Hongzhi stated that since late February this year, the global energy market has experienced violent fluctuations, with many countries facing energy shortages, soaring oil prices, and tight supply. China's energy system, however, has maintained overall balance between supply and demand, and overall price stability. 王宏志表示，今年 2 月底以来全球能源市场剧烈波动，多国出现能源短缺、油价暴涨与供应紧张，中国能源体系供需总体平衡、价格总体稳定。

Regarding energy security during the "15th Five-Year Plan" period, he proposed three points: strengthening the "development" and "reserves" of fossil fuels, with coal as the biggest guarantee for stable supply; significantly increasing the supply of non-fossil energy; and expanding the "circle of friends" for energy cooperation, adhering to diversified energy imports. 针对「十五五」能源安全，他提出三点：做好化石能源「开发」和「储备」，将煤炭作为稳定供应的最大底气；显著提升非化石能源供给；扩大能源合作「朋友圈」，坚持能源进口多元化。

Regarding carbon reduction and emission reduction, Ren Yuzhi, spokesperson for the National Energy Administration and Director of the Development Planning Department, stated that on the supply side, they will expand clean energy supply and facilitate the transformation of traditional energy, while on the consumption side, they will focus on conservation and substitution, including energy saving and efficiency improvement for new high-energy-consuming industries such as computing power. 降碳减排方面，国家能源局新闻发言人、发展规划司司长任育之表示，将在供给侧做大清洁能源供应、做好传统能源转型，在消费侧抓节约和替代，包括算力等新型高载能产业的节能提效。

item.title: 7999 元起，vivo X Fold6 折叠屏手机正式发布
item.guid: 7999-元起，vivo-X-Fold6-折叠屏手机正式发布
item.description:
vivo officially released the X Fold6 foldable smartphone, starting at 7999 yuan, with official sales beginning on July 1. The new phone offers three regular color options: Blue Cave, Salt Lake, and Polar Night, while the foldable professional imaging set also includes a Black Gold color. vivo 正式发布 X Fold6 折叠屏手机，售价 7999 元起，7 月 1 日正式开售。新机提供蓝洞、盐湖、极夜三种常规配色，折叠专业影像套装另有黑金配色。

    Screen: 8.02-inch Samsung M14 120Hz inner screen, 6.51-inch BOE 120Hz outer screen, both inner and outer screens support hardware-level 1nit low-light adjustment;

    Imaging: 200-megapixel HPB 1/1.4-inch F1.68 Zeiss main camera, 50-megapixel ultra-wide-angle, 50-megapixel LYT602 3X periscope Zeiss telephoto, supports 200mm G2 teleconverter, and is equipped with V3+ imaging chip;

    Performance and Battery Life: Dimensity 9500 Ultra processor, built-in 7000mAh battery, supports 80W wired charging and 40W wireless charging.

The vivo TWS 5 Pro earphones, also released at the event, are priced at 999 yuan, with an initial launch price of 949 yuan. 同场发布的 vivo TWS 5 Pro 耳机定价 999 元，首发价 949 元。

item.title: 启境 GT7 上市，首批搭载华为乾崑 ADS 5
item.guid: 启境-GT7-上市，首批搭载华为乾崑-ADS-5
item.description:
GAC Group and Huawei Qiankun jointly launched the high-end intelligent new energy brand Qijing, releasing its first model, the Qijing GT7. Positioned as a mid-to-large intelligent shooting brake coupe, its official guide price starts from 209,900 yuan, with a total of 5 versions available. The top-tier Ultra+ triple-motor all-wheel-drive version is priced at 329,900 yuan. 广汽集团与华为乾崑联合打造的高端智能新能源品牌启境，发布首款车型启境 GT7，定位中大型智能猎装轿跑，官方指导价 20.99 万元起，共推出 5 个版本，顶配 Ultra+ 三电机四驱版为 32.99 万元。

    Body dimensions (length, width, height) are 5050mm, 1980mm, and 1470mm, with a wheelbase of 3000mm and a drag coefficient of 0.198Cd;

    The cockpit features a new generation Harmony intelligent assistant, a 21-speaker 7.1.4 HUAWEI SOUND audio system, HUAWEI XHUD augmented reality head-up display, and dual zero-gravity seats in the front row;

    When the rear seats are folded down, a 1.9-meter flat space can be formed. The standard trunk volume is 647L, expanding to 1606L when folded down;

    The first batch is equipped with Huawei Qiankun Zhijia ADS 5, featuring 36 sensors, including an 896-line dual-optical-path image-level LiDAR, 11 high-definition cameras, 5 millimeter-wave radars, and 12 ultrasonic radars.

The official statement claims that the 896-line LiDAR can stably detect small obstacles 120 meters away. The vehicle adopts an L3-level full-link redundant architecture and has obtained L3-level autonomous driving road test permits in Guangzhou, with over 300,000 kilometers of L3 road test verification before market launch. 官方称，896 线激光雷达可稳定探测 120 米外的小尺寸障碍物，车辆采用 L3 级全链路冗余架构，并已取得广州市 L3 级自动驾驶道路测试许可，上市前 L3 道路测试实车验证里程超过 30 万公里。

item.title: 乐奇 Rokid 全球首发 AI 眼镜微信扫一扫支付
item.guid: 乐奇-Rokid-全球首发-AI-眼镜微信扫一扫支付
item.description:
At the Rokid Open Day 2026 Global Ecosystem and Developer Conference held yesterday, Rokid announced a partnership with WeChat, globally launching the WeChat Scan function for AI glasses. Users wearing the glasses can look at a WeChat QR code and complete WeChat Pay with a single voice command. 在昨日举行的 Rokid Open Day 2026 全球生态及开发者大会上，乐奇 Rokid 宣布与微信合作，全球首发 AI 眼镜的微信扫一扫功能。用户佩戴眼镜看向微信收款码后，即可通过一句话完成微信支付。

Rokid glasses previously supported Alipay AI Pay for quick digital payments and are currently the only AI glasses brand compatible with both Alipay and WeChat Pay platforms. Rokid 眼镜此前已支持支付宝 AI 付快捷数字支付，目前是唯一同时适配支付宝、微信支付双平台的 AI 眼镜品牌。

In addition to payment functions, Rokid glasses already support displaying navigation information and scenarios such as unlocking shared bicycles and paying parking fees. At this conference, Rokid glasses also partnered with Amap to launch an AI ride-hailing intelligent travel assistant, allowing users to complete a ride-hailing request with a single voice command. 除支付功能外，Rokid 眼镜已支持显示导航信息，以及解锁共享单车、支付停车费等场景。此次大会上，Rokid 眼镜还与高德地图合作，推出 AI 打车智能出行助手，用户一句话即可完成打车。

item.title: 4.18 万元起，张雪机车发布 820R 和 820RR-R
item.guid: 4.18-万元起，张雪机车发布-820R-和-820RR-R
item.description:
Zhangxue Motorcycle released two new motorcycle models: the 820R street bike and the 820RR-R sportbike. The 820R street bike has a unified retail price of 41,800 yuan, available in black and white; the 820RR-R sportbike has a unified retail price of 61,980 yuan, available in black, white, and red. 张雪机车发布 820R 街车和 820RR-R 仿赛两款摩托车新品。820R 街车统一零售价 4.18 万元，提供黑、白两种配色；820RR-R 仿赛统一零售价 6.198 万元，提供黑、白、红三种配色。

The 820R is equipped with an inline three-cylinder engine, with a maximum power of 99kW@12000rpm, a maximum torque of 80N·m@9500rpm, and a maximum speed of 13750rpm. The 820RR-R also uses an inline three-cylinder engine, with a maximum speed of 14750rpm, a maximum power of 107kW, and a maximum torque of 85N·m. 820R 搭载直列三缸发动机，最大功率 99kW@12000rpm，最大扭矩 80N·m@9500rpm，最高转速 13750rpm。820RR-R 同样采用直列三缸发动机，最高转速 14750rpm，最大功率 107kW，最大扭矩 85N·m。

The 820RR-R features a lightweight design, with a curb weight of 186kg, 0-100km/h acceleration in 2.81 seconds, and is equipped with a 6.2-inch Android touchscreen instrument cluster. 820RR-R 采用轻量化设计，整备质量 186kg，零百加速 2.81 秒，配备 6.2 英寸 Android 触屏仪表。

Zhangxue Motorcycle also launched the 820RR-R Champion Edition, featuring champion custom colors, with a unified retail price of 65,980 yuan; the company also advises that 820 series motorcycles are powerful, and those with less than one year of motorcycle riding experience are prohibited from purchasing them. 张雪机车还推出 820RR-R 冠军版，采用冠军定制配色，统一零售价 6.598 万元；公司同时提示，820 系摩托车动力较强，摩托车驾龄不满一年者禁止购买。

item.title: 微博 CLI 工具正式上线：专为开发者和 AI Agent 打造，超 70 API 一键调用
item.guid: 微博-CLI-工具正式上线：专为开发者和-AI-Agent-打造，超-70-API-一键调用
item.description:
Weibo Open Platform officially launched the weibo CLI tool yesterday, open to developers and AI agent users, supporting direct invocation of Weibo platform capabilities via command line or Agent workflow, covering core scenarios such as content publishing, interaction management, content retrieval, and hot topic trend analysis. 微博开放平台昨日正式推出 weibo CLI 工具，面向开发者与 AI 智能体用户开放，支持通过命令行或 Agent 工作流直接调用微博平台能力，覆盖内容发布、互动管理、内容检索与热点趋势分析等核心场景。

The tool runs on Node.js 18 and above. After installation, identity verification and environment checks can be completed via `weibo auth whoami` and `weibo doctor`. Core capability modules include: 该工具基于 Node.js 18 及以上版本运行，安装后可通过 weibo auth whoami 与 weibo doctor 完成身份验证与环境检查。核心能力模块包括：

    Image-text, video, and long Weibo publishing;

    Unified management of comments and reposts;

    Atomic content retrieval by keyword and user dimension;

    Hot searches and topic trends accessed in structured data format.

In addition, the platform also offers fan profile insights and marketing automation capabilities, supporting script-based execution of operational actions such as lucky draws and bulk distribution. Regarding pricing, weibo CLI adopts a Credits billing model: 此外，平台还开放了粉丝画像洞察与营销自动化能力，支持抽奖和批量分发等运营动作的脚本化执行。在定价方面，weibo CLI 采用 Credits 计费模式：

    The free plan is limited to 5 calls per hour, only supports personal data, and offers a 7-day trial;

    The entry-level Basic tier provides 3,000 Credits, priced at 29 yuan per month;

    Plus is priced at 69 yuan per month, includes 7,500 Credits, and opens up bulk reading and advanced interfaces;

    The Pro tier provides 32,000 Credits, priced at 299 yuan per month;

    The Ultra tier for enterprises provides 100,000 Credits, priced at 899 yuan per month.

item.title: 国补继续，第三批 625 亿元消费品以旧换新资金已下达
item.guid: 国补继续，第三批-625-亿元消费品以旧换新资金已下达
item.description:
According to CCTV News, the National Development and Reform Commission recently issued the third batch of 62.5 billion yuan in ultra-long-term special national bonds this year to support funds for consumer goods trade-ins. The National Development and Reform Commission, in conjunction with the Ministry of Finance and other departments, issues relevant funds in batches quarterly this year to maintain a steady pace of consumer goods trade-in work and balanced use of funds. 据央视新闻报道，国家发展改革委近日已下达今年第三批 625 亿元超长期特别国债支持消费品以旧换新资金。国家发改委会同财政部等部门今年按季度分批次下达相关资金，以保持消费品以旧换新工作节奏平稳、资金使用均衡。

As of June 20, the consumer goods trade-in program for 2026 has benefited 136 million people, driving sales exceeding 1 trillion yuan. The leverage ratio of subsidy funds has increased from 1:7.8 in 2025 to 1:10.3, meaning every 1 yuan of subsidy funds invested drives 10.3 yuan in household consumption. 截至 6 月 20 日，2026 年消费品以旧换新惠及 1.36 亿人次，带动销售额超过 1 万亿元。补贴资金撬动比由 2025 年的 1:7.8 提升至 1:10.3，即每投入 1 元补贴资金，带动 10.3 元居民消费。

Driven by the policy, from January to May this year, retail sales of high-energy-efficiency home appliances among units above a designated size increased by over 30%, the retail penetration rate of new energy vehicles in the market exceeded 60% for two consecutive months, and retail sales of newly included smart wearable devices such as smart glasses grew by over 100% year-on-year. 政策带动下，今年 1 至 5 月，限额以上单位中高能效等级家电零售额增长超过 30%，新能源汽车市场零售渗透率连续两个月超过 60%，今年新增纳入补贴范围的智能眼镜等可穿戴智能设备零售额同比增长超过 1 倍。

item.title: 《四渡》上映，聚焦「四渡赤水」战役
item.guid: 《四渡》上映，聚焦「四渡赤水」战役
item.description:
The film "Four Crossings" officially premiered yesterday. The film focuses on the "Four Crossings of the Chishui River" battle in the history of the Long March, setting the story at the historical juncture in 1935 when the Red Army, outnumbered, achieved a desperate breakthrough. 电影《四渡》昨日正式上映。影片聚焦长征史上的「四渡赤水」战役，把故事放在 1935 年红军以少胜多、完成绝地突围的历史节点上。

Public information shows that "Four Crossings" is directed by Xu Zhanxiong, supervised by Andrew Lau, and stars Liu Ye, Wang Lei, Yu Shi, Wang Zhifei, Wang Yaoqing, Lin Yongjian, Xu Weizhou, etc. It is based on the Battle of Sidu Chishui during the Central Red Army's Long March. Liu Ye plays Mao Zedong, Wang Lei plays Zhou Enlai, Wang Zhifei plays Zhu De, and Yu Shi plays the original character Zhao Defa. 公开资料显示，《四渡》由徐展雄执导、刘伟强监制，刘烨、王雷、于适、王志飞、王耀庆、林永健、许魏洲等主演，取材自中央红军长征期间的四渡赤水战役。刘烨饰演毛泽东，王雷饰演周恩来，王志飞饰演朱德，于适饰演原创角色赵德发。

item.title: One Fun Thing｜用手腕肌电信号操控设备，念象科技 Omniband 获天使轮融资
item.guid: One-Fun-Thing｜用手腕肌电信号操控设备，念象科技-Omniband-获天使轮融资
item.description:
According to 36Kr, Nianxiang Technology, which focuses on non-invasive neural interface technology, has completed an angel round financing of nearly 10 million yuan. This round of financing was led by Yongjun Xingmang, with Pudong Venture Capital and Yicun Capital co-investing. 据 36 氪报道，专注非侵入式神经接口技术的念象科技已完成近千万元天使轮融资，本轮融资由永珺星芒领投，浦东创投、一村资本跟投。

Nianxiang Technology was established at the end of last year, and its first product, Omniband, is a wrist-worn surface electromyography neural interface device. It does not directly read brain cortical signals, but rather analyzes hand movement intentions and continuous dynamic gestures through neuromuscular electrical signals at the wrist. 念象科技成立于去年底，首款产品 Omniband 是一款腕戴式表面肌电神经接口设备。它并不直接读取大脑皮层信号，而是通过手腕处的神经肌肉电信号，解析手部运动意图和连续动态手势。

It attempts to turn "hand movements" into a new input method: users can control mobile phones, computers, smart glasses, and smart homes through gestures in the air, and can also achieve aerial handwriting, creating an interactive experience similar to "invisible keyboard and mouse". 它试图把「动手」这件事变成新的输入方式：用户可通过手势隔空操控手机、电脑、智能眼镜和智能家居，也能实现空中手写，形成类似「隐形键鼠」的交互体验。

item.title: 周末看什么｜《玩具总动员 5》
item.guid: 周末看什么｜《玩具总动员-5》
item.description:
The 3D animated film "Toy Story 5," co-produced by Pixar and Walt Disney Pictures, is the sequel to "Toy Story 4" and the fifth main installment in the series. Directed by Andrew Stanton, it features the return of voice actors Tom Hanks, Tim Allen, Joan Cusack, and others. It is also the first main installment in the series without the involvement of co-founder John Lasseter. 由皮克斯与华特迪士尼影片联合出品的 3D 动画《玩具总动员5》是《玩具总动员4》续集、主系列第五部正传，由安德鲁·斯坦顿执导，汤姆·汉克斯、蒂姆·艾伦、琼·库萨克等回归配音，也是该系列首部无联合创始人约翰·拉塞特参与的正传。

The plot focuses on the childhood crisis in the digital age: eight-year-old Bonnie is obsessed with her frog-shaped tablet, "Little Lotus Tablet," and neglects her toys. Jessie, who takes over as the "new sheriff," embarks on a road adventure, uniting with Woody, Buzz Lightyear, and the "Buzz Lightyear Corps" stranded on a desert island, ultimately helping Bonnie rediscover true friendship. 剧情聚焦数字时代的童年危机：八岁的邦妮沉迷于青蛙造型平板「小荷平板」而冷落玩具，接任「新警长」的翠丝在一场公路冒险中，联合胡迪、巴斯光年及流落荒岛的「巴斯光年军团」，最终帮助邦妮重拾真实友谊。

In terms of critical reception, Rotten Tomatoes gave it a 93% fresh rating based on 272 reviews, and Metacritic scored it 73. Douban rated it 8.1, with 58,653 participants. Meanwhile, Stanton hinted at the premiere that the "Bonnie Trilogy" is not yet complete, which is interpreted by the outside world as Pixar already planning the sixth installment. 口碑方面，烂番茄基于 272 篇评论给出 93% 新鲜度、Metacritic 73 分；豆瓣评分 8.1 分，58653 人参与。与此同时，斯坦顿在首映式暗示「邦妮三部曲」尚未完结，外界解读为皮克斯已在筹划第六部。

item.title: 买书不读指南｜《结束一周工作后，我会去动物园做梦》
item.guid: 买书不读指南｜《结束一周工作后，我会去动物园做梦》
item.description:
"After a Week of Work, I'll Go to the Zoo to Dream" is edited by Shen Zhijun, director of Nanjing Hongshan Forest Zoo, and collects works from the Hongshan Zoo's "In the Name of Poetry, Let the Rare Be Cherished" natural poetry collection event. 《结束一周工作后，我会去动物园做梦》由南京红山森林动物园园长沈志军主编，收录红山动物园「以诗之名，让珍稀被珍惜」自然诗歌征集活动中的作品。

Hongshan Zoo has received attention in recent years, and while the animal species are part of it, more importantly, it has adjusted the way people view animals: there are no animal performances, no emphasis on fixed tour routes, and animals can choose not to be seen. 红山动物园这些年受到关注，动物种类只是其中一部分，更重要的是它调整了人观看动物的方式：没有动物表演，不强调固定游览路线，动物也可以选择不被看到。

The poems in the book come from children, office workers, seniors, and ordinary tourists, who wrote down their observations of the non-human world during their brief stays. 书里的诗来自孩子、上班族、老人和普通游客，他们在短暂停留中写下对非人类世界的观察。

item.title: 游戏推荐｜《死亡搁浅 2：冥滩之上》
item.guid: 游戏推荐｜《死亡搁浅-2：冥滩之上》
item.description:
"Death Stranding 2: On the Beach" is an action-adventure game developed by Kojima Productions, with Hideo Kojima serving as director, writer, producer, and designer. 《死亡搁浅 2：冥滩之上》是小岛工作室开发的动作冒险游戏，由小岛秀夫担任总监、编剧、制作人与设计师。

The game picks up 11 months after the events of "Death Stranding." Protagonist Sam Porter Bridges initially sought a reclusive life with Lou, but a new crisis forces him to embark on another journey to Mexico and Australia, connecting more regions to the Chiral Network and continuing to explore the series' core question: "Is connection necessary?" 游戏承接《死亡搁浅》故事 11 个月后的时间线，主角山姆·波特·布里吉斯原本试图与洛隐居生活，但新的危机迫使他再次踏上旅程，前往墨西哥与澳大利亚，将更多地区接入开罗尔网络，并继续追问系列核心命题：「连接是必要的吗？」

Compared to the first installment, this game expands the setting from the American wasteland to Australia, enhancing delivery and route planning pressure with dynamic environments such as sandstorms, earthquakes, timefall, and changes in river water levels. 相比初代，本作将舞台从美国废土扩展至澳大利亚，以沙尘暴、地震、时间雨、河流水位变化等动态环境强化送货与路线规划压力。

IGN China gave it a high score of 9, calling it "an excellent sequel" and believing that this installment is more focused on narrative and has corrected the pain points of its predecessor in terms of gameplay, especially with significant improvements in stealth, combat, equipment progression, and mission pacing. IGN 中国给出 9 分高分，评价其为「一部卓越的续作」，认为本作在叙事上更专注，也在玩法上修正了前作痛点，尤其是潜行、战斗、装备成长和任务节奏均有明显改进。
